Opening browser to sign in…

rue&client_id=aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee&response_type=code&redirect_u
ri=https%3A%2F%2Fplatform.claude.com%2Foauth%2Fcode%2Fcallback&scope=user%3Aprofile
